channel.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2021
item.description:
PaaS (PostgreSQL as a Service)

  • Scaleway Managed Database - Fully managed PostgreSQL databases with HA, scaling, and automated backups, hosted in the EU. Starting at €10 per month.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Dec 7th - Dec 13th, 2020
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • PostgreSQL Primer for Busy People - A collection of the most common commands used in PostgreSQL

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2020
item.description:
Extensions

  • pg_cronstars1k - Run periodic jobs in PostgreSQL.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2020
item.description:
PaaS (PostgreSQL as a Service)

  • Google Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL - Fully-managed database service that makes it easy to set up, maintain, manage, and administer your PostgreSQL relational databases on Google Cloud Platform.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2020
item.description:
GUI

  • Beekeeper Studio - Free and open source SQL client with a modern UI and great Postgres support. Cross platform.
  • DataRow - Cross-platform SQL Client for Amazon Redshift: Simple, Effortless, Extensible.
  • OmniDB - Open Source Collaborative Environment

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres May 18th - May 24th, 2020
item.description:
High-Availability

  • Slony-I - "Master to multiple slaves" replication system with cascading and failover.

    • Utilities

  • pg-differstars30 - Tool for easy initialization / updating of the structure of PostgreSQL tables, migration alternative (Node.js).
  • pg_docs_botstars12 - Browser extension to redirect PostgreSQL docs links to the current version.

    • Resources

    Blogs

  • Bruce Momjian's PostgreSQL blog

    • Optimization

  • pgMustard - A modern user interface

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Apr 27th - May 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Utilities

  • ScaffoldHub.io - Generate fullstack PostgreSQL apps with Angular, Vue or React (Commercial Software).

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Apr 20th - Apr 26th, 2020
item.description:
Backups

  • wal-gstars1.7k - The successor of WAL-E rewritten in Go. Currently supports cloud object storage services by AWS (S3), Google Cloud (GCS), Azure, as well as OpenStack Swift, MinIO, and file system storages. Supports block-level incremental backups, offloading backup tasks to a standby server, provides parallelization and throttling options. In addition to Postgres, WAL-G can be used for MySQL and MongoDB databases.

    • CLI

  • pgshstars434 - Branch your PostgreSQL Database like Git
  • nancy - The Nancy CLI is a unified way to manage automated database experiments either in clouds or on-premise
  • schemaspystars1.8k - SchemaSpy is a JAVA JDBC-compliant tool for generating your database to HTML documentation, including Entity Relationship diagrams

    • Server

  • AgensGraph - Powerful graph database based on the PostgreSQL.

    • Monitoring

  • PMMstars200 - Percona Monitoring and Management (PMM) is a Free and Open Source platform for monitoring and managing PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB.
  • pgmetrics - pgmetrics is an open-source, zero-dependency, single-binary tool that can collect a lot of information and statistics from a running PostgreSQL server and display it in easy-to-read text format or export it as JSON and CSV for scripting.
  • okmeter.io - Commercial SaaS agent-based monitoring with a very detailed PostgreSQL plugin. It automatically gathers 100s of stats, displays dashboards on every aspect and sends alerts when something goes wrong (Commercial Software).

    • Extensions

  • Citusstars4.8k - Scalable PostgreSQL cluster for real-time workloads.
  • PipelineDB - A PostgreSQL extension that runs SQL queries continuously on streams, incrementally storing results in tables.
  • TimescaleDB - Open-source time-series database fully compatible with Postgres, distributed as extension
  • pgRoutingstars822 - pgRouting extends the PostGIS/PostgreSQL geospatial database to provide geospatial routing and other network analysis functionality.

    • Optimization

  • pg_flamestars1.4k - A flamegraph generator for query plans.

    • Utilities

  • Hasura GraphQL Enginestars21.6k - Blazing fast, instant realtime GraphQL APIs on Postgres with fine grained access control, also trigger webhooks on database events.
  • pg_activitystars1.3k - top like application for PostgreSQL server activity monitoring.
  • PgBouncer - Lightweight connection pooler for PostgreSQL.
  • pg_insightsstars257 - Convenient SQL for monitoring Postgres database health.
  • pgpool-II - Middleware that provides connection pooling, replication, load balancing and limiting exceeding connections.
  • PGXN clientstars87 - Command line tool to interact with the PostgreSQL Extension Network
  • postgres-checkup - a new-generation diagnostics tool that allows users to collect deep analysis of the health of a Postgres database.

    • Language bindings

  • Go: pqstars6.5k, pgxstars4.1k
  • Haskell: postgresql-simple
  • Node: node-postgresstars9.6k, pg-promisestars2.9k, pogistars142, slonikstars2.3k, postgresstars2k
  • Python: psycopg2, asyncpg
  • Ruby: pgstars457

    • PaaS (PostgreSQL as a Service)

  • Aiven PostgreSQL - PostgreSQL as a service in AWS, Azure, DigitalOcean, Google Cloud and UpCloud; plans range from $19/month single node instances to large highly-available setups, free trial for two weeks.
  • Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL - Amazon Relational Database Service (RDS) for PostgreSQL
  • Azure Database for PostgreSQL - Azure Database for PostgreSQL provides fully managed, enterprise-ready community PostgreSQL database as a service. It provides builtin HA, elastic scaling and native integration with Azure ecosystem.
  • Citus Cloud - Production grade scaled out PostgreSQL as a service enabling real-time workloads and sharding your multi-tenant apps.
  • Compose - PostgreSQL as a service in AWS, Google Cloud Platform, and IBM Cloud; plans range from $17.5/month for 1GB storage and scale at $12/GB beyond that. Free trial for 30 days available.
  • Database Labs - Get a production-ready cloud PostgreSQL server in minutes, from $20 a month Backups, monitoring, patches, and 24/7 tech support all included.
  • DigitalOcean Managed Databases - Fully managed PostgreSQL databases. No free plan. Starting at $15/mo. Daily backups with point-in-time recovery. Standby nodes with auto-failover.
  • ElephantSQL - Offers databases ranging from shared servers for smaller projects and proof of concepts, up to enterprise grade multi server setups. Has free plan for up to 5 DBs, 20 MB each.
  • Heroku Postgres - Plans from free to huge, operated by PostgreSQL experts. Does not require running your app on Heroku. Free plan includes 10,000 rows, 20 connections, up to two backups, and has PostGIS support.

    • Docker images

  • citusdata/citus - Citus official images with citus extensions. Based on the official Postgres container.
  • mdillon/postgis - PostGIS 2.3 on Postgres 9. Based on the official Postgres container.
  • postgres - Official postgres container (from Docker)

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • pg-utilsstars536 - Useful DBA tools by Data Egret

    • Resources

    Articles

  • What PostgreSQL has over other open source SQL databases: Part II
  • the ultimate postgres vs mysql blog post
  • Superfast CSV imports using PostgreSQL's COPY command

    • Resources

    Documentation

  • Wiki - user documentation, how-tos, and tips 'n' tricks

    • Resources

    Videos

  • Postgres Conference Youtube channel - Conference videos
  • Scaling Postgres - Postgres video blog series by Creston Jamison

    • Resources

    Community

  • Mailing lists - Official mailing lists for Postgres for support, outreach, and more. One of the primary channels of communication in the Postgres community.
  • Reddit - A reddit community for PostgreSQL users with over 12000 users
  • Slack - Slack channel for Postgres with over 7000 users
  • Telegram - Several groups for PostgreSQL in different langauges: Russian >4200 people, Brazilian Portuguese >2300 people, Indonesian ~1000 people, English >750 people
  • #postgresql on Freenode - The most popular IRC channel about Postgres on Freenode with over 1000 users

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Jan 28th - Feb 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Language bindings

  • Clojure: clj-postgresqlstars140

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Dec 3rd - Dec 9th, 2018
item.description:
Resources

Videos

  • Citus Data Youtube channel - Citus related videos
  • EnterpriseDB Youtube channel - EnterpriseDB related videos

    • Backups

  • pgBackRest - Reliable PostgreSQL Backup & Restore.
  • Barman - Backup and Recovery Manager for PostgreSQL by 2ndQuadrant.
  • pghoardstars1k - Backup and restore tool for cloud object stores (AWS S3, Azure, Google Cloud, OpenStack Swift).

    • GUI

  • DBeaver - Universal Database Manager with excellent support for PostgreSQL.

    • High-Availability

  • pglookoutstars131 - Replication monitoring and failover daemon.

    • Distributions

  • Postgres.app - The Easiest Way to Get Started with PostgreSQL on macOS.

    • Extensions

  • pg_partmanstars1.1k - Partition management extension for PostgreSQL.
  • pgTAP - Database testing framework for Postgres

    • Utilities

  • PostgRESTstars17k - Serves a fully RESTful API from any existing PostgreSQL database.
  • sqitchstars2.2k - Tool for managing versioned schema deployment

    • Language bindings

  • Perl: DBD-Pg

    • Resources

    Blogs

  • Andrew Dunstan's PostgreSQL and Technical blog
  • Michael Paquier's blog
  • Robert Haas' blog

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Nov 12th - Nov 18th, 2018
item.description:
GUI

  • Numeracy - Fast SQL editor with charts and dashboards for PostgreSQL (Commercial Software).

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Oct 22nd - Oct 28th, 2018
item.description:
Utilities

  • pgbadgerstars2.3k - Fast PostgreSQL Log Analyzer.
  • sqlcheckstars2k - Automatically detects common SQL anti-patterns. Such anti-patterns often slow down queries. Addressing them will, therefore, help accelerate queries.

    • Server

  • Greenplum Databasestars4.5k - Open source fork of PostgreSQL for large data volumes.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Jul 23rd - Jul 29th, 2018
item.description:
Backups

  • pg_backstars124 - pg_back is a simple backup script

    • Utilities

  • pg_chameleonstars278 - Real time replica from MySQL to PostgreSQL with optional type override migration and migration capabilities.
  • pg_bulkload - It's a high speed data loading utility for PostgreSQL.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Jul 2nd - Jul 8th, 2018
item.description:
High-Availability

  • PAFstars294 - PostgreSQL Automatic Failover: High-Availibility for Postgres, based on Pacemaker and Corosync.

    • Extensions

  • HypoPGstars610 - HypoPG provides hypothetical/virtual indexes feature.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Mar 26th - Apr 1st, 2018
item.description:
Utilities

  • PostGraphilestars10.2k - Instant GraphQL API or GraphQL schema for your PostgreSQL database

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Mar 19th - Mar 25th, 2018
item.description:
Utilities

  • ldap2pgstars131 - Synchronize roles and privileges from YML and LDAP.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Dec 11th - Dec 17th, 2017
item.description:
Monitoring

  • pgwatch2stars991 - Flexible and easy to get started PostgreSQL metrics monitor focusing on Grafana dashboards.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Nov 6th - Nov 12th, 2017
item.description:
Utilities

  • pRESTstars2.7k - Serve a RESTful API from any PostgreSQL database (Golang)

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • postgresDBSamplesstars175 - A collection of sample postgres schemas

    • Language bindings

  • Lua: luapgsqlstars95

    • GUI

  • Metabase - Simple dashboards, charts and query tool for PostgreSQL.

    • Monitoring

  • opm.io - Open PostgreSQL Monitoring is a free software suite designed to help you manage your PostgreSQL servers. It can gather stats, display dashboards and send warnings when something goes wrong.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Sep 18th - Sep 24th, 2017
item.description:
Extensions

  • pgMementostars265 - Provides an audit trail for your data inside a PostgreSQL database using triggers and server-side functions written in PL/pgSQL.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Aug 28th - Sep 3rd, 2017
item.description:
Server

  • Postgres-XL - Scalable Open Source PostgreSQL-based Database Cluster.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Jul 3rd - Jul 9th, 2017
item.description:
Distributions

  • PostgreSql.Binaries.Litestars23 - Minimum set of Windows binaries of the PostgreSQL database. Also made available through NuGet.

    • GUI

  • Holistics - Online cross platform database management tool and SQL query reporting GUI with strong PostgreSQL support (Commercial Software).

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Jun 5th - Jun 11th, 2017
item.description:
Utilities

  • pg-formatterstars48 - A PostgreSQL SQL syntax beautifier (Node.js).

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Apr 24th - Apr 30th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

Articles

  • Why use Postgres?

    • Resources

    Newsletters

  • Postgres Weekly - Weekly newsletter that contains articles, news, and repos relevant to PostgreSQL.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Apr 17th - Apr 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Language bindings

  • .Net/.Net Core: Npgsqlstars2.3k

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Apr 3rd - Apr 9th, 2017
item.description:
Utilities

  • pg_migratestars24 - Manage PostgreSQL codebases and make VCS simple.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Mar 20th - Mar 26th, 2017
item.description:
Monitoring

  • Instrumentalstars13 - Real-time performance monitoring, including pre-made graphs for ease of setup (Commercial Software)

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Feb 27th - Mar 5th, 2017
item.description:
Backups

  • pg_probackupstars397 – A fork of pg_arman, improved by @PostgresPro, supports incremental backups, backups from replica, multithreaded backup and restore, and anonymous backup without archive command.

    • Extensions

  • PG_Themisstars28 - Postgres binding as extension for crypto library Themis, providing various security services on PgSQL's side.
  • cyanaudit - Cyan Audit provides in-database logging of all DML activity on a column-by-column basis.
  • pgxn PostgreSQL Extension Network - central distribution point for many open-source PostgreSQL extensions

    • Utilities

  • apgdiff - Compares two database dump files and creates output with DDL statements that can be used to update old database schema to new one.
  • ZSONstars385 - PostgreSQL extension for transparent JSONB compression

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Jan 23rd - Jan 29th, 2017
item.description:
High-Availability

  • SkyToolsstars248 - Replication tools, including PgQ, a queuing system, and Londiste, a replication system a bit simpler to manage than Slony.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Jan 9th - Jan 15th, 2017
item.description:
Monitoring

  • pgbench - Run a benchmark test on PostgreSQL.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Nov 28th - Dec 4th, 2016
item.description:
Resources

Blogs

  • Planet PostgreSQL - Blog aggregation service for PostgreSQL.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Nov 14th - Nov 20th, 2016
item.description:
Utilities

  • pglistendstars24 - A lightweight PostgresSQL LISTEN/NOTIFY daemon built on top of node-postgres.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Nov 7th - Nov 13th, 2016
item.description:
High-Availability

  • Patronistars4k - Template for PostgreSQL HA with ZooKeeper or etcd.
  • Stolonstars3.2k - PostgreSQL HA based on Consul or etcd, with Kubernetes integration.
  • repmgrstars1.2k - Open-source tool suite to manage replication and failover in a cluster of PostgreSQL servers.

    • Backups

  • OmniPITRstars167 - Advanced WAL File Management Tools for PostgreSQL.
  • wal-estars3.2k - Simple Continuous Archiving for PostgreSQL to S3, Azure, or Swift by Heroku.

    • GUI

  • Adminer - Full-featured database management tool written in PHP.
  • DataGrip - IDE with advanced tool sets and good cross-platform experience (Commercial Software).
  • Datazenit - Web-based PostgreSQL GUI (Commercial Software).
  • JackDB - Web-based SQL query interface (Commercial Software).

    • Monitoring

  • check_pgactivitystars143 - check_pgactivity is designed to monitor PostgreSQL clusters from Nagios. It offers many options to measure and monitor useful performance metrics.
  • Check_postgresstars446 - Nagios check_postgres plugin for checking status of PostgreSQL databases.
  • libzbxpgsqlstars152 - Comprehensive PostgreSQL monitoring module for Zabbix.
  • Pomestars1.1k - Pome stands for PostgreSQL Metrics. Pome is a PostgreSQL Metrics Dashboard to keep track of the health of your database.
  • pg_viewstars451 - Open-source command-line tool that shows global system stats, per-partition information, memory stats and other information.

    • Extensions

  • cstore_fdwstars1.6k - Columnar store for analytics with PostgreSQL.
  • pglogicalstars472 - Extension that provides logical streaming replication.
  • pg_paxosstars301 - Basic implementation of Paxos and Paxos-based table replication for a cluster of PostgreSQL nodes.
  • pg_shardstars1.1k - Extension to scale out real-time reads and writes.
  • PGStrom - Extension to offload CPU intensive workloads to GPU.
  • plpgsql_checkstars334 - Extension that allows to check plpgsql source code.
  • PostGIS - Spatial and Geographic objects for PostgreSQL.
  • zomboDBstars3.3k - Extension that enables efficient full-text searching via the use of indexes backed by Elasticsearch.

    • Optimization

  • PgHerostars5.9k - PostgreSQL insights made easy.

    • Utilities

  • ERAlchemystars794 - ERAlchemy generates Entity Relation (ER) diagram from databases.
  • mysql-postgresql-converterstars1.2k - Lanyrd's MySQL to PostgreSQL conversion script.
  • ora2pg - Perl module to export an Oracle database schema to a PostgreSQL compatible schema.
  • pganalyze - PostgreSQL Performance Monitoring (Commercial Software).
  • pgCenterstars1.2k - Provides convenient interface to various statistics, management task, reloading services, viewing log files and canceling or terminating database backends.
  • pgclimbstars348 - Export data from PostgreSQL into different data formats.
  • pgfutterstars1.2k - Import CSV and JSON into PostgreSQL the easy way.
  • PGInsight - CLI tool to easily dig deep inside your PostgreSQL database.
  • pgloaderstars3.4k - Loads data into PostgreSQL using the COPY streaming protocol, and does so with separate threads for reading and writing data.
  • pgsyncstars2k - Tool to sync PostgreSQL data to your local machine.
  • postgresql-metricsstars536 - Tool that extracts and provides metrics for your PostgreSQL database.
  • yokestars1.4k - PostgreSQL high-availability cluster with auto-failover and automated cluster recovery.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • Backup and recover a PostgreSQL DB using wal-e - Tutorial about setting up continuous archiving in PostgreSQL using wal-e.
  • PG Casts - Free weekly PostgreSQL screencasts by Hashrocket.
  • Postgres Guide - Guide designed as an aid for beginners and experienced users to find specific tips and explore tools available within PostgreSQL.
  • PostgreSQL Exercises - Site to make it easy to learn PostgreSQL by doing exercises.
  • tutorialspoint PostgreSQL tutorial - Very extensive collection of tutorials on PostgreSQL

    • Resources

    Blogs

  • Craig Kerstiens PostgreSQL posts - Set of posts on PostgreSQL cool features, tips and tricks.
  • Database Soup - Josh Berkus' blog.
  • select * from depesz; - Hubert Lubaczewski's blog.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Oct 31st - Nov 6th, 2016
item.description:
CLI

  • psql - The built-in PostgreSQL CLI client

    • High-Availability

  • BDRstars347 - BiDirectional Replication - a multimaster replication system for PostgreSQL

    • Utilities

  • pgcmpstars28 - Tool to compare database schemas, with capability to accept some persistent differences

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Oct 10th - Oct 16th, 2016
item.description:
Utilities

  • pgmigratestars492 - CLI tool to evolve schema migrations, developed by Yandex.

    • GUI

  • dbglass - Cross-platform desktop client for PostgreSQL, built with Electron.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Oct 3rd - Oct 9th, 2016
item.description:
Resources

Articles

  • Debugging PostgreSQL performance, the hard way

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Sep 12th - Sep 18th, 2016
item.description:
Backups

  • pitrery - pitrery is a set of Bash scripts to manage Point In Time Recovery (PITR) backups for PostgreSQL.

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Sep 5th - Sep 11th, 2016
item.description:
Language bindings

  • Common Lisp: Postmodernstars276
  • Elixir: postgrexstars825
  • Rust: rust-postgresqlstars2.1k

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2016
item.description:
Resources

Articles

  • What PostgreSQL has over other open source SQL databases: Part I

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Mar 7th - Mar 13th, 2016
item.description:
Language bindings

  • PHP: Pomm, pecl/pqstars30

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2016
item.description:
Language bindings

  • Java: PostgreSQL JDBC Driver

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Nov 16th - Nov 22nd, 2015
item.description:
CLI

  • psql2csvstars156 - Run a query in psql and output the result as CSV

item.title: dhamaniasad/awesome-postgres Jul 27th - Aug 2nd, 2015
item.description:
CLI

  • pgclistars9.6k - Postgres CLI with autocompletion and syntax highlighting
